signals.raw:
Bitcoin Surges Past $74K on April 14, 2026, Driven by Easing U.S.-Iran Tensions and $400-500M Short Liquidations | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][3][4]

Bitcoin price climbed to $74,535 (up 5.34% in 24 hours), breaking $74K resistance amid a relief rally from de-escalation signals in the U.S.-Iran standoff, including President Trump's negotiation comments and reduced Strait of Hormuz disruption fears

signals.headline: South Korea March CPI Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March CPI Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below Consensus; ING Sees Building Inflation Pressures from Oil and Currency | NO | MED confidence**  
South Korea's consumer price inflation increased to 2.2% year-on-year in March from 2.0% in February, missing the 2.3% market consensus, with monthly prices up 0.3% versus 0.6% expected; transportation rose 5% YoY but core inflation edged down to 2.2%.[1]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Fed March FOMC Minutes Confirm Some Officials Discussed Rate Hikes if Inflation Exceeds 2% | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Fed March FOMC Minutes Confirm Some Officials Discussed Rate Hikes if Inflation Exceeds 2% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Minutes revealed participants argued for raising the target rate if inflation surpasses 2%, linked to rising energy from Middle East tensions, though Powell views disruptions as short-term and markets price 98.4% chance of April hold.[2]
